summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Match&Live room/apartment finder app. All features working perfectly including header with sticky behavior, hero section, how it works steps, swipeable property cards, filter functionality, testimonials, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend health endpoint /api/health returns correct response
Header renders with logo, navigation links, and CTA button
Header becomes sticky with backdrop blur on scroll
Hero section renders with title, subtitle, CTA buttons, and property cards
How It Works section renders 4 step cards with icons and descriptions
Deck/Pisos section renders property cards with swipe functionality
Filter chips toggle active state correctly when clicked
Budget input accepts and updates values correctly
Swipe buttons (Atras, Siguiente) navigate cards correctly
Testimonials section renders 4 cards with star ratings and author info
Footer renders with logo and navigation links
Navigation links scroll to correct sections smoothly
Mobile responsive layout works across all sections
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
